$schema_comment: Example registry-style manifest for OpenClaw/ClawHub-adjacent listings. OpenClaw runtime loads AgentSkills folders (SKILL.md); this JSON is for catalogs, CI, or publisher APIs.
name: neoxlink
description: Natural language to structured intent via UNSPSC (where applicable): MCP tools neoxlink.parse_preview, neoxlink.confirmed_submit; optional neoxlink.match_intent when NEOXLINK_ENABLE_MATCH=1.

agentskills.notes: Vendor or publish the sibling SKILL.md; keep frontmatter name/description in sync with this manifest.

tools.name: neoxlink.parse_preview
tools.summary: NL → structured preview with UNSPSC when applicable; no auto-confirm.

tools.name: neoxlink.confirmed_submit
tools.summary: Parse + confirm (+ optional resolve) for durable structured records.

tools.name: neoxlink.match_intent
tools.summary: Optional local match when engine enabled via NEOXLINK_ENABLE_MATCH=1.
